metadata.note: Tuareg/Azawad separatism and the northern Mali question. A2 anchor==subject: the group name and Kidal carry the precision, so no primary_target and no generic domain verbs. DROPPED after pre-audit: Azawad/CSP/Menaka/Gao/Tinzaouaten/self-determination/secession (all 0 hits in 180d -- the corpus says FLA and Kidal, not Azawad), Timbuktu (1 hit and it is the 'Timbuktu Triangle' in NIGERIA, a Boko Haram story -- outright collision). 'rebel' kept at 60/18% foreign: the foreign is RUSSIA co-mention (Moscow rejecting the rebels' withdrawal call), benign. Some overlap with sahel_jihadist_insurgency is expected and correct -- JNIM and the FLA are running a joint offensive; spec §1 says maximise purity, not chase zero overlap.
